articles.title: Shiba Inu Burn Rate Spikes Over 2,700% Despite Market Slowdown
articles.description: Shiba Inu’s price action has been on a consolidation activity since the beginning of the week. However, the Shiba Inu community has ramped up SHIB burn activities in the past 24 hours, pushing the burn rate up by more than 2,700%.
